steps.title: Match both parts of the claim
steps.content: The claim requires a quotation showing that Electra knows how intense her grief is and also thinks that grief is justified. The strongest evidence must include both self-awareness and a reason for continuing to grieve.

steps.title: Reject partial evidence
steps.content: A shows intense lament but not justification. B shows that grief weighs her down and that she wants help, not that she defends the grief. D shows she will keep mourning but does not explain why it is justified. The matching quotation says she knows her passion and that the causes are dire. The answer is C.
